subject: bansenshukai
object: Survives in two main manuscript traditions: a Kōga version (22 chapters in 10+1 volumes) and an Iga version (22 chapters in 12+4 volumes).

subject: bansenshukai
object: Translated into English as "The Book of Ninja" by Antony Cummins and Yoshie Minami (2013).

subject: bansenshukai
object: Compiled in 1676, after the Sengoku-period height of ninja activity had passed and during a long peace under Tokugawa rule; its compiler was not a contemporary of the practices it records but drew on earlier oral and written tradition.
